lines.en: SFX
―㌍Whoosh... whooosh...
Eri
It's been so long since then
How long since Ms. Ozaki and I parted?
President
Your mind is made up, then?
...Yes
After we talked, I decided to retire
So many experiences. So many wounds
I feel like I lost all kinds of
things, but still...
The outside... isn't so bad
A world outside the net, seen for the
first time. And the bonds there...
The old me was too scared to even
want to set foot in it...
But now... little by little...
I can even go out for walks like this
It was such a short time, but
thanks to my time as an idol, I...
Someday... maybe friends, too?
I might make some. Besides Cineria...
friends I can meet face to face
I'm not who I used to be.
The snow melts, little by little...
I wonder how Ai-chan and Ryo-san are
It's been... so long
Maybe they've forgotten
all about me? But...
maybe I'll try writing them
Even if we're not colleagues anymore,
I bet those two would talk like always
That's right. I'm still... still me...
Maybe now that I'm not an idol,
we can become true friends
As just one girl... 'Eri Mizutani'...
